WorkType, WorkTypeFeed, WorkTypeGroup, WorkTypeGroupFeed, WorkTypeGroupHistory, WorkTypeGroupMember, WorkTypeGroupMemberFeed, WorkTypeGroupMemberHistory, WorkTypeGroupShare, WorkTypeHistory, WorkTypeShare
public class SObject extends Object

Java class for sObject complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="sObject">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="fieldsToNull" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Id" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • fieldsToNull

    • id

      protected String id

  • Constructor Details

    • SObject

      public SObject()

  • Method Details

    • getFieldsToNull

      public List<String> getFieldsToNull()
      Gets the value of the fieldsToNull property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the fieldsToNull property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getFieldsToNull().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      Returns:
      The value of the fieldsToNull property.

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Gets the value of the id property.
      Returns:
      possible object is String

    • setId

      public void setId(String value)
      Sets the value of the id property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is String
